decks.title: AI in Action — From Idea to Live Product, Solo
decks.description: How a single builder ships real products end-to-end with AI as pair-programmer — workflow, mindset, and live demos.

decks.title: The Hurricane v2 — A Field Guide to Investing
decks.description: A 6-part field guide to the markets: the storm, the hurricane, the instruments, the expensive help, the pilot, and the cockpit — ending in the calm.

decks.title: Quantifyd — Trading Automation: Progress & Roadmap
decks.description: A walkthrough of the live trading automation stack: the ORB cash strategy, the KC6 60-min system, and the MQ paper-trading roadmap — what's running, what's next.

decks.title: Trading Automation, Illustrated — Field Notes (v2 concept)
decks.description: A ciechanow.ski-style reimagining of the trading deck: scrubbable price chart, live OR detection, real signal logic, two knobs to tweak the algorithm — the diagram is the explanation.
